bindings.title: TEAC cassette deck
bindings.excerpt: The transfer deck now points to the mechanics of a public live-music commons instead of another samey music article.
bindings.source_title: Live Music Archive (etree.org) – Internet Archive Help Center
bindings.source_summary: A procedural guide to how volunteer-fan archiving, permissions, formats, and public access actually work inside the Live Music Archive.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Internet Archive Live Music Archive help page

bindings.title: Hong Kong Action Cinema case file
bindings.excerpt: A full John Woo dossier right on the desk keeps the world from collapsing into one archive lane.
bindings.source_summary: Criterion frames Hard Boiled as violence-as-poetry and gives the film branch of the desk a concrete, legible anchor.

bindings.title: Plant / nursery tags bin
bindings.excerpt: The plant bin drags in a totally different mode of attention: practical habitat design, palette limits, and front-yard planning.
bindings.source_summary: A stepwise guide to choosing a native palette, sketching beds, and thinking through habitat structure instead of ornamental sameness.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Homegrown National Park native landscape page

bindings.title: Qin folio open score
bindings.excerpt: The open folio makes room for slow heritage memory right next to all the noisier material.
bindings.source_title: Guqin and its music - UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage
bindings.source_summary: UNESCO documents the guqin as an intangible heritage practice, giving the desk a lineage of notation, transmission, and contemplative listening.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the UNESCO guqin page

bindings.title: Intake form clipboard
bindings.excerpt: The clipboard maps to a delightfully obsessive metadata instinct: who played what, who sang backup, what got preserved in the margins.
bindings.source_summary: A handmade archive of transcribed liner notes that turns credits, provenance, and recording trivia into a public service.

bindings.title: This Is Fine printout
bindings.excerpt: The meme printout now really goes somewhere weird: algorithmic folklore, sensonarrative power, and Tung Tung Tung Sahur.
bindings.source_title: Tung Tung Tung Sahur’s sensonarrative power
bindings.source_summary: A dense essay on Italian Brainrot, Indonesian wake-up signal culture, and the commentary ecology around uncanny AI meme circulation.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Algorithmic Folklore Substack essay

bindings.title: Screenshots tray
bindings.excerpt: A live Jaipongan performance lands in the screenshot tray as one more active thread in the desk, not the whole story.
bindings.source_title: Bajidoran / Jaipong Ujang Lanay Di STSI
bindings.source_summary: A communal performance clip that keeps the desk connected to rhythm, choreography, and live social energy.
bindings.source_image_alt: YouTube thumbnail for Bajidoran / Jaipong Ujang Lanay Di STSI

bindings.title: Voice memo rough cut cassette
bindings.excerpt: The rough-cut tape points back to the bigger archive shelf, but now as one strand in a much messier, fuller desk ecology.
bindings.source_summary: The public-facing Live Music Archive shelf gives the desk its visible repository layer after the procedural help page handles the mechanics.
